name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】High-end feel
 The GG Marmont that was a hit in the fashion world last season is still going strong this year. The new Mini series fully interprets retro and luxury, bursting with cuteness 😱 Model: 547260 Dimensions: 21*15*8cm
